response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience in geospatial data processing and distributed systems, directly aligning with the core responsibilities of designing and operating routing data pipelines. His long-running GISCollective project and work with Green Map Association highlight deep expertise in GIS. While his explicit modern C++ experience is somewhat dated, his strong background in systems-level languages like Dlang and C, coupled with a proven willingness to adapt and learn new technologies, indicates a high capability to excel in the role.
strengths: Deep expertise in geospatial data processing and GIS platforms.
Strong background in distributed systems and low-latency data pipelines.
Proven ability to learn new technologies and work across the full stack.
concerns: Explicit "modern C++" experience is not clearly demonstrated and appears older.
Direct experience with "routing tiling" specifically is not explicitly mentioned.
Most recent roles lean towards web/JS/TS, moving away from core systems languages.
